This increase translates into only a 0.1–0.6% rise in overall production costs because data plays a relatively small role in firm production compared to computation.
32146.zh_abstract: 通过规范企业收集和使用数据的方式，隐私法可能改变企业对信息技术投入的需求。我们以欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）为背景，利用来自一家全球云计算提供商七年的数据，研究企业如何应对隐私法。我们的双重差分估计表明，相对于可比的美国企业，欧盟企业在应对GDPR时，数据存储减少了26%，数据处理减少了15%，变得不那么“数据密集型”。为了估计GDPR对企业的成本，我们提出并估计了一个生产函数，其中企业在生产中结合数据和计算。我们发现数据和计算是强互补品，并且企业的反应与GDPR一致，代表着数据成本增加了22%。由于数据在企业生产中的作用相对于计算较小，这一增加仅导致总生产成本上升0.1-0.6%。

32145.title: Climate Change, Population Growth, and Population Pressure
32145.zh_title: 气候变化、人口增长与人口压力
32145.authors: J. Vernon Henderson, Bo Yeon Jang, Adam Storeygard, David N. Weil
32145.abstract: We develop a novel method for assessing the effect of constraints imposed by spatially-fixed natural resources on aggregate economic output. We apply it to estimate and compare the projected effects of climate change and population growth over the course of the 21st century, by country and globally. We find that standard population growth projections imply larger reductions in income than even the most extreme widely-adopted climate change scenario (RCP8.5). Further, climate change and population growth will have their most damaging effects in similar places. Relative to previous work on macro climate impacts, our approach has the advantages of being disciplined by a simple macro growth model that allows for adaptation and of assessing impacts via a large set of climate moments, not just annual average temperature and precipitation. Our estimated effects of climate are by construction independent of country-level factors such as institutions.
32145.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，用于评估空间固定的自然资源约束对总体经济产出的影响。我们应用该方法，按国家和全球层面，估计并比较了21世纪气候变化和人口增长的预期影响。我们发现，标准的人口增长预测意味着收入减少幅度甚至超过最极端且被广泛采用的气候变化情景（RCP8.5）。此外，气候变化和人口增长将在相似的地方产生最具破坏性的影响。与以往关于宏观气候影响的研究相比，我们的方法具有以下优势：受一个允许适应的简单宏观增长模型的约束，并通过大量气候矩（而不仅仅是年平均温度和降水）来评估影响。我们估计的气候效应，按构建方式，独立于制度等国家层面因素。

32144.title: Labor Migration, Capital Accumulation, and the Structure of Rural Labor Markets
32144.zh_title: 劳动力迁移、资本积累与农村劳动力市场结构
32144.authors: Taryn Dinkelman, Grace Kumchulesi, Martine Mariotti
32144.abstract: Between 1967 and 1974, a bilateral treaty increased circular labor migration from Malawi to South Africa by 200%, bringing over 53 million USD in earnings into origin communities. A deadly migrant worker plane crash in 1974 ended these flows and led to migrant repatriation. We study how this shock affected local labor markets. In regions receiving more migrant capital after the crash, workers, particularly women, shifted from farming into non-farm work over thirty years. Investments in non-farm physical and human capital contribute to these sectoral changes. This natural experiment shows that temporary capital inflows can permanently reshape rural labor markets.
32144.zh_abstract: 1967年至1974年间，一项双边条约使从马拉维到南非的循环劳动力迁移增加了200%，为原籍社区带来了超过5300万美元的收入。1974年一场致命的 migrant 工人飞机失事终止了这些流动并导致 migrant 遣返。我们研究了这一冲击如何影响当地劳动力市场。在空难后接收更多 migrant 资本的地区，工人（尤其是女性）在三十多年间从农业转向非农工作。对非农物质资本和人力资本的投资促进了这些部门变化。这一自然实验表明，临时性资本流入可以永久性地重塑农村劳动力市场。

32143.title: Technology Regulation Reconsidered: The Effects of Certificate of Need Policies on the Quantity and Quality of Diagnostic Imaging
32143.zh_title: 技术监管再思考：需求证明政策对诊断影像数量和质量的影响
32143.authors: Jill Horwitz, Austin Nichols, Carrie H. Colla, David M. Cutler
32143.abstract: Estimates of the impact of Certificate of Need laws on medical care have been inconsistent, possibly because not all CON laws apply to all services. Using an original dataset identifying imaging-related CON laws, we estimate the effects of CON on CT and MRI, using regression discontinuities at state borders. Medicare beneficiaries in regulated states are slightly less likely to receive any image and considerably less likely to receive low-value imaging than beneficiaries in non-regulated states. High-value imaging is either unaffected or declines much less. Overall, CON reduces low value care and largely leaves high value care unaffected.
32143.zh_abstract: 关于需求证明法律对医疗保健影响的估计结果一直不一致，可能因为并非所有CON法律都适用于所有服务。利用一个识别影像相关CON法律的原始数据集，我们使用州界上的断点回归估计了CON对CT和MRI的影响。受监管州的医疗保险受益人与非监管州的受益人相比，接受任何影像检查的可能性略低，而接受低价值影像检查的可能性则低得多。高价值影像要么不受影响，要么下降幅度小得多。总体而言，CON减少了低价值医疗服务，并在很大程度上使高价值医疗服务不受影响。

32142.title: Invoice Currency Choice in Intra-Firm Trade: A Transaction-Level Analysis of Japanese Automobile Exports
32142.zh_title: 公司内部贸易中的发票货币选择：基于日本汽车出口交易层面的分析
32142.authors: Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto, Kiyotaka Sato, Takatoshi Ito, Junko Shimizu, Yushi Yoshida
32142.abstract: This study empirically investigates how the invoice currency choice differs between intra-firm and arm’s-length exports. We also examine whether other firm- and product-level characteristics affect the choice of invoice currency. This study is the first to be granted access to highly disaggregated transaction-level trade data for Japan. Focusing on Japanese automobile exports to France, we demonstrate that the importer’s currency tends to be chosen in intra-firm export invoicing based on a panel logit estimation. Our empirical findings remain robust when different types of intra-firm export variables and other conventional explanatory variables are introduced, such as firm and product market share, exchange rate volatility, euro-invoiced imports, labor productivity, and research and development intensity. Given growing intra-firm trade and expanding global value chains, Japanese parent firms tend to invoice in the importers’ currency, assuming the foreign exchange risk that arises from intra-firm trade. Thus, exchange rate risk management is a significant consideration for Japanese parent firms.
32142.zh_abstract: 本研究实证调查了公司内部出口与公平交易出口之间发票货币选择的差异。我们还考察了其他企业和产品层面的特征是否影响发票货币的选择。本研究是首个获准访问日本高度细化的交易层面贸易数据的研究。聚焦于日本对法国的汽车出口，我们基于面板logit估计证明，在公司内部出口发票中倾向于选择进口商货币。当引入不同类型的公司内部出口变量和其他传统解释变量（如企业和产品市场份额、汇率波动性、欧元计价进口、劳动生产率和研发强度）时，我们的实证结果依然稳健。鉴于公司内部贸易的增长和全球价值链的扩展，日本母公司倾向于以进口商货币开具发票，承担公司内部贸易产生的外汇风险。因此，汇率风险管理是日本母公司的一个重要考量。

32141.title: How Managers Can Use Purchaser Performance Information to Improve Procurement Efficiency
32141.zh_title: 管理者如何利用采购绩效信息提高采购效率
32141.authors: Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Marcelo Olivares, Raimundo Undurraga
32141.abstract: We examine the effect of performance monitoring in public procurement through the lens of organizational culture in a principal-agent model where the manager (principal) and buyers (agents) may have different beliefs about how much the government values efficiency. We show that the effect of performance information not only increases efficiency but is greater when the buyer’s belief is stronger than the manager’s belief. We leverage a new e-procurement system in Chile to test these ideas by randomizing monthly reports on the purchasing performance of buyers and further whether the individual performance reports were disclosed to managers. We find that the reports generated sizable reductions in overspending — with savings reaching a 15% reduction or 0.1% of GDP — but only when individual performance was observable to managers. This is consistent with extrinsic motivation rather than intrinsic motivation driving buyer behavior. Consistent with the theoretical model, we also find that the gain in efficiency is concentrated in procurement units where buyer belief that the government cares about efficiency is stronger than manager belief. Our results highlight the key role played by organizational culture in mediating the impact of purchasing performance information on preventing the misuse of public resources.
32141.zh_abstract: 我们通过组织文化的视角，在一个委托代理模型中考察了公共采购中绩效监控的效果，其中管理者（委托人）和采购员（代理人）可能对政府重视效率的程度持有不同信念。我们表明，绩效信息不仅提高了效率，而且当采购员的信念强于管理者的信念时，其效果更大。我们利用智利新的电子采购系统，通过随机分配关于采购员采购绩效的月度报告，以及是否将个人绩效报告披露给管理者，来检验这些想法。我们发现，这些报告显著减少了超支——节省幅度达到15%或GDP的0.1%——但只有当个人绩效对管理者可见时才如此。这与外在激励而非内在激励驱动采购员行为是一致的。与理论模型一致，我们还发现效率提升集中在采购单位中，这些单位里采购员认为政府关心效率的信念强于管理者的信念。我们的结果强调了组织文化在调节采购绩效信息对防止公共资源滥用的影响中所起的关键作用。

32177.title: Diversity and Discrimination in the Classroom
32177.zh_title: 课堂中的多样性与歧视
32177.authors: Dan Anderberg, Gordon B. Dahl, Cristina Felfe, Helmut Rainer, Thomas Siedler
32177.abstract: What makes diversity unifying in some settings but divisive in others? We examine how the mixing of ethnic groups in German schools affects intergroup cooperation and trust. We leverage the quasi-random assignment of students to classrooms within schools to obtain variation in the type of diversity that prevails in a peer group. We combine this with a large-scale, incentivized lab-in-field-experiment based on the investment game, allowing us to assess the in-group bias of native German students in their interactions with fellow natives (in-group) versus immigrants (out-group). We find in-group bias peaks in culturally polarized classrooms, where the native and immigrant groups are both large, but have different religious or language backgrounds. In contrast, in classrooms characterized by non-cultural polarization, fractionalization, or a native supermajority, there are significantly lower levels of own-group favoritism. In terms of mechanisms, we find empirical evidence that culturally polarized classrooms foster negative stereotypes about immigrants' trustworthiness and amplify taste-based discrimination, both of which are costly and lead to lower payouts. In contrast, accurate statistical discrimination is ruled out by design in our experiment. These findings suggest that extra efforts are needed to counteract low levels of inclusivity and trust in culturally polarized environments.
32177.zh_abstract: 什么因素使得多样性在某些环境中促进团结，而在另一些环境中导致分裂？我们研究了德国学校中不同族裔群体的混合如何影响群体间的合作与信任。我们利用学生被准随机分配到校内不同班级的情况，来获得同伴群体中主导的多样性类型的变化。我们结合基于投资游戏的大规模、有激励的实地实验室实验，评估了德国本土学生在与本土同胞（内群体）和移民（外群体）互动时的内群体偏见。我们发现，在文化两极分化的班级中，内群体偏见达到顶峰——这些班级中本土群体和移民群体规模都很大，但具有不同的宗教或语言背景。相比之下，在非文化两极分化、碎片化或本土群体占绝对多数的班级中，对自己群体的偏袒程度显著较低。在机制方面，我们找到经验证据表明，文化两极分化的班级会强化对移民可信赖性的负面刻板印象，并放大基于偏好的歧视，这两者都会带来成本并导致更低的收益。相反，在我们的实验中，准确的统计歧视被设计排除在外。这些发现表明，在文化两极分化的环境中，需要付出额外努力来抵消低水平的包容性和信任。

32176.title: The Secular Decline of Bank Balance Sheet Lending
32176.zh_title: 银行资产负债表贷款的长期下降
32176.authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
32176.abstract: This paper examines the decline of the bank balance sheet model of financial intermediation since 1970 and its regulatory implications. The share of private lending on bank balance sheets fell from 55% in the 1970s to 33% in 2023, while the deposit share of savings dropped from 21% to 13%. Loans as a percentage of bank assets also declined from 70% to 55%. We develop a model that captures the interaction between bank balance sheets and originate-to-distribute (OTD) intermediation through securities holdings. Our analysis identifies three key factors driving these trends: a shift in borrower demand toward informationally insensitive lending, a shift in saver demand away from deposits, and evolving regulations affecting bank balance sheets. Regulatory changes and technological advancements primarily drive these shifts. Borrower demand plays a dominant role in reducing balance sheet lending, particularly from the 1970s to the 1990s. Saver demand shifts away from deposits have reduced bank balance sheets but had a smaller impact on overall lending. Bank regulation, especially since the financial crisis, has altered bank balance sheet composition. Simulations of increased capital requirements show that while balance sheets contract in both the 1960s and 2020s, the impact on overall lending is smaller today due to the substitution of bank loans with debt securities. These results suggest the financial sector has become more resilient to regulatory changes, with the decline in bank balance sheet intermediation reshaping the trade-offs faced by macroprudential policies and financial regulation.
32176.zh_abstract: 本文考察了自1970年以来金融中介的银行资产负债表模型的下降及其监管影响。银行资产负债表上的私人贷款份额从1970年代的55%下降到2023年的33%，而储蓄中的存款份额从21%下降到13%。贷款占银行资产的比例也从70%下降到55%。我们构建了一个模型，捕捉银行资产负债表与通过证券持有进行的“发起-分销”中介之间的相互作用。我们的分析确定了推动这些趋势的三个关键因素：借款人需求向信息不敏感贷款的转变、储蓄者需求从存款的转移，以及影响银行资产负债表的监管演变。监管变化和技术进步主要驱动了这些转变。借款人需求在减少资产负债表贷款中起主导作用，尤其是在1970年代至1990年代。储蓄者需求从存款转移减少了银行资产负债表，但对整体贷款的影响较小。银行监管，尤其是自金融危机以来，改变了银行资产负债表的构成。对提高资本要求的模拟显示，尽管在1960年代和2020年代资产负债表都会收缩，但由于银行贷款被债务证券替代，如今对整体贷款的影响更小。这些结果表明，金融部门对监管变化的韧性增强，银行资产负债表中介的下降重塑了宏观审慎政策和金融监管所面临的权衡。
32176.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：E50, G2, G20, G21, G22, G23, G24, G28, G29, L50

32175.title: From Dominant to Producer Currency Pricing: Dynamics of Chilean Exports
32175.zh_title: 从主导货币定价到生产者货币定价：智利出口的动态变化
32175.authors: José De Gregorio, Pablo García, Emiliano E. Luttini, Marco Rojas
32175.abstract: We revisit a central question for international macroeconomics: the response of export prices and quantities to movements in the exchange rate (ER). We use granular export data for Chile and study how the effects of ER movements vary over time with the currency of invoicing and the destination of exports. For prices, we find that the short-run effects of bilateral ER movements vanish when controlling for U.S. dollar ER, which supports dominant currency pricing. However, over longer horizons a more significant role is played by bilateral ER movements, in line with the predictions of producer currency pricing. These dynamics do not depend on the invoicing currency. The results we find for quantities support the view that bilateral exchange rate movements contribute to macroeconomic adjustment through export volumes over the medium term.
32175.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了国际宏观经济学的核心问题：出口价格和数量对汇率变动的反应。我们使用智利的微观出口数据，研究汇率变动的影响如何随计价货币和出口目的地随时间变化。对于价格，我们发现，在控制美元汇率后，双边汇率变动的短期效应消失，这支持了主导货币定价。然而，在更长的时期内，双边汇率变动发挥了更显著的作用，这与生产者货币定价的预测一致。这些动态变化不依赖于计价货币。我们关于数量的结果支持了以下观点：双边汇率变动通过出口数量在中期内促进宏观经济调整。

32174.title: Sectoral Debt and Global Dollar Cycles in Developing Economies
32174.zh_title: 发展中经济体的部门债务与全球美元周期
32174.authors: Bada Han, Rashad Ahmed, Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak
32174.abstract: We explore the role of sectoral debt dynamics in shaping business cycles in a sample of 52 Emerging Market Economies (EMEs) and Frontier Market Economies (FMEs) from 2005 to 2021. Higher household debt levels and growth are associated with significantly slower GDP growth in more developed EMEs but not in less developed EMEs and FMEs. We also examine the relationship between US dollar cycles, sectoral debt levels and growth, and economic activity. Among developed EMEs, higher expected household debt growth magnifies the impact of US dollar fluctuations on economic activity, with significant but less persistent effects on consumption and more persistent effects on investment. Our empirical findings highlight the important role of household debt dynamics in relatively developed EMEs.
32174.zh_abstract: 我们利用2005年至2021年52个新兴市场经济体和前沿市场经济体的样本，探讨了部门债务动态在塑造经济周期中的作用。在较发达的新兴市场经济体中，较高的家庭债务水平和增长与显著较慢的GDP增长相关，但在较不发达的新兴市场经济体和前沿市场经济体中则不然。我们还考察了美元周期、部门债务水平和增长与经济活动之间的关系。在发达的新兴市场经济体中，较高的预期家庭债务增长放大了美元波动对经济活动的影响，对消费有显著但较不持久的影响，对投资则有更持久的影响。我们的实证发现强调了家庭债务动态在相对发达的新兴市场经济体中的重要作用。

32173.title: The value of forecasts: Experimental evidence from India
32173.zh_title: 预测的价值：来自印度的实验证据
32173.authors: Fiona Burlig, Amir Jina, Erin M. Kelley, Gregory V. Lane, Harshil Sahai
32173.abstract: Unpredictable weather makes it challenging for households and firms to make optimal investment decisions. Technologies that reduce these risks are crucial for climate change adaptation. We experimentally evaluate one such technology—an accurate, localized, early monsoon onset forecast—in India, randomizing 250 villages into control, forecast, or insurance. The forecast changes farmers' beliefs about the coming growing season. In response, forecast farmers adapt their behavior along multiple margins, changing cultivated area, crop choice, farm input expenditure, and off-farm business. By enabling farmers to tailor their investments to coming weather, forecasts reduce farmers' risk exposure and increase aggregate welfare.
32173.zh_abstract: 不可预测的天气使得家庭和企业难以做出最优投资决策。降低这些风险的技术对于气候变化适应至关重要。我们通过实验评估了这样一种技术——在印度提供准确、本地化的季风早期预报——随机将250个村庄分为对照组、预报组或保险组。预报改变了农民对即将到来的生长季节的信念。作为回应，获得预报的农民在多个方面调整了行为，改变了耕种面积、作物选择、农业投入支出和非农业务。通过使农民能够根据即将到来的天气调整投资，预报降低了农民的风险暴露并增加了总体福利。
32173.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D81, O12, O13, Q12, Q54

32172.title: The Slanted-L Phillips Curve
32172.abstract: A slanted-L curve is well-suited to represent the non-linearity of the celebrated Phillips curve. We show this using cross-country data of major industrialized economies since 2009, including the inflationary surge of the 2020s. At high unemployment rates, an increase in demand reduces unemployment without creating strong inflationary pressures. Meanwhile, supply shocks have a muted effect. At sufficiently low unemployment, there is a labor shortage, so that the economy is at full capacity. Then, higher demand is inflationary, and supply shocks are amplified. We derive a model of a slanted-L curve.
32172.zh_abstract: 倾斜L型曲线非常适合表示著名的菲利普斯曲线的非线性。我们使用自2009年以来主要工业化经济体的跨国数据（包括2020年代的通货膨胀激增）来证明这一点。在高失业率时，需求增加会降低失业率，而不会产生强大的通胀压力。同时，供给冲击的影响被削弱。在失业率足够低时，存在劳动力短缺，经济处于满负荷状态。此时，更高的需求会引发通胀，而供给冲击会被放大。我们推导了一个倾斜L型曲线的模型。

32171.title: Who Gets the Job? The Consequences of Strategic Information Sharing within Social Networks
32171.zh_title: 谁得到工作？社交网络中战略信息共享的后果
32171.authors: Gaurav Chiplunkar, Erin M. Kelley, Gregory V. Lane
32171.abstract: We study how job-seekers share information about jobs within their social network, and its implications for the quality of applicants and hires. We randomly increase the amount of competition for a job that we created and find that jobseekers are less likely to share information about the job, especially with their high ability peers. This lowers the quality of applicants, hires, and performance on the job — suggesting that disseminating job information through social networks may result in lower quality applicants than expected for competitive positions. While randomly offering higher wages attracts better talent, it is not able to fully overcome these strategic disincentives.
32171.zh_abstract: 我们研究了求职者如何在其社交网络中分享关于工作的信息，以及这对申请人和被录用者质量的影响。我们随机增加了我们创建的一个职位的竞争程度，发现求职者分享该职位信息的可能性降低，尤其是与高能力同伴分享的可能性降低。这降低了申请人、被录用者的质量以及工作表现——这表明通过社交网络传播职位信息可能导致竞争性职位的申请人质量低于预期。虽然随机提供更高的工资能吸引更优秀的人才，但这无法完全克服这些战略性的抑制因素。

32170.title: Do Information Frictions and Corruption Perceptions Kill Competition? A Field Experiment On Public Procurement in Uganda
32170.zh_title: 信息摩擦和腐败认知会扼杀竞争吗？乌干达公共采购的实地实验
32170.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Francesco Loiacono, Edwin Muhumuza, Edoardo Teso
32170.abstract: We study whether information frictions and corruption perceptions deter firms from doing business with the government. We conduct two nationwide randomized controlled trials (RCTs) in collaboration with the national public procurement supervisory and anti-corruption agency in Uganda. The first RCT aims to increase firms’ information on available procurement opportunities, which is limited due to the lack of a centralized e- procurement system. We provide firms with direct and timely access to information about government tenders over a two-year period. The second RCT focuses on firms’ perceptions about the integrity of public entities, which we experimentally show are key drivers of firms’ participation in procurement. We provide firms with access to structured information on other firms’ perceptions and on anti-corruption audits. We find that increasing information on available procurement opportunities alone does not increase firm participation in public procurement. However, changing firms’ perceptions about the integrity of public entities increases firms’ total number of bids and total government contracts won. Based on our findings, our partner agency implemented several measures to further restore firms’ trust in public entities. Overall, our findings point to the limits of transparency reforms that aim to increase competition in public procurement without accounting for firms’ perceptions about government corruption and inefficiency.
32170.zh_abstract: 我们研究了信息摩擦和腐败认知是否阻碍企业与政府开展业务。我们与乌干达国家公共采购监督和反腐败机构合作，进行了两项全国性的随机对照试验。第一项随机对照试验旨在增加企业关于可用采购机会的信息——由于缺乏集中的电子采购系统，这些信息是有限的。我们在两年内为企业提供关于政府招标的直接和及时信息。第二项随机对照试验聚焦于企业对公共实体诚信度的认知——我们通过实验证明，这些认知是企业参与采购的关键驱动因素。我们为企业提供关于其他企业认知和反腐败审计的结构化信息。我们发现，仅增加关于可用采购机会的信息并不会提高企业参与公共采购的程度。然而，改变企业对公共实体诚信度的认知会增加企业的总投标次数和获得的总政府合同数量。基于我们的发现，我们的合作机构实施了多项措施以进一步恢复企业对公共实体的信任。总体而言，我们的发现指出了透明度改革的局限性——如果不考虑企业对政府腐败和低效率的认知，这些改革旨在增加公共采购中的竞争。
32170.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, POL；JEL：G3, H57, O12, P0

32169.title: Demand Shocks as Technology Shocks
32169.zh_title: 需求冲击作为技术冲击
32169.authors: Yan Bai, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull, Kjetil Storesletten
32169.abstract: We provide a macroeconomic theory where demand for goods has a productive role. A search friction prevents perfect matching between producers and potential customers. Larger demand induces more search, which in turn increases GDP and measured TFP. We embed the product-market friction in a standard neoclassical model and estimate it using Bayesian techniques. Business cycles are driven by preference shocks, true technology shocks, and investment-specific shocks. Preference shocks have qualitatively similar effects as true productivity shocks. These shocks account for a large share of the fluctuations in consumption, GDP, and measured TFP and can be identified using shopping time data.
32169.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种宏观经济理论，其中商品需求具有生产性作用。搜索摩擦阻碍了生产者与潜在客户之间的完美匹配。更大的需求会引发更多的搜索，进而提高GDP和测算出的全要素生产率（TFP）。我们将产品市场摩擦嵌入一个标准的新古典主义模型中，并使用贝叶斯方法对其进行估计。经济周期由偏好冲击、真实技术冲击和投资特定冲击驱动。偏好冲击在定性上具有与真实生产率冲击相似的效果。这些冲击解释了消费、GDP和测算出的TFP波动中的很大一部分，并且可以使用购物时间数据进行识别。

32168.title: Climate Policy Reform Options in 2025
32168.authors: John Bistline, Kimberly A. Clausing, Neil Mehrotra, James H. Stock, Catherine Wolfram
32168.abstract: With the expiration of many tax cuts and unmet climate targets, 2025 could be a crucial year for climate policy in the United States. Using an integrated model of energy supply and demand, this paper aims to assess climate policies that the U.S. federal government may consider in 2025 and to evaluate emissions reductions, abatement costs, fiscal impacts, and household energy expenditures across a range of policy scenarios. The model results show several key findings. First, the emissions reductions of the Inflation Reduction Act are significantly augmented under scenarios that add a modest carbon fee or, to a lesser extent, that implement a clean electricity standard in the power sector. Second, net fiscal costs can be substantially reduced in scenarios that include a carbon fee, especially if fossil fuel exports are taxed. Third, expanding the IRA tax credits yields modest additional emissions reductions with higher fiscal costs. Finally, although none of the policy combinations across these scenarios achieve the U.S. target of a 50-52% economy-wide emissions reduction by 2030 from 2005 levels, the carbon fee and clean electricity standard scenarios achieve these levels between 2030 and 2035.
32168.zh_abstract: 随着许多税收减免政策的到期以及气候目标未能实现，2025年可能成为美国气候政策的关键一年。本文利用一个能源供需综合模型，旨在评估美国联邦政府可能在2025年考虑的气候政策，并在一系列政策情景下评估减排量、减排成本、财政影响以及家庭能源支出。模型结果显示了几个关键发现。首先，在那些增加适度碳费或（在较小程度上）在电力部门实施清洁电力标准的情景下，《通胀削减法案》的减排效果得到显著增强。其次，在包含碳费的情景下，尤其是在对化石燃料出口征税的情况下，净财政成本可以大幅降低。第三，扩大《通胀削减法案》的税收抵免会带来适度的额外减排，但财政成本更高。最后，尽管这些情景中的政策组合均未实现美国到2030年将全经济范围排放量从2005年水平减少50-52%的目标，但碳费和清洁电力标准情景在2030年至2035年间达到了这些水平。

32167.title: Do Medical Treatments Work for Work? Evidence from Breast Cancer Patients
32167.zh_title: 医学治疗对工作有效吗？来自乳腺癌患者的证据
32167.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, William N. Evans, Mikkel Hasse Pedersen, Mircea Trandafir
32167.abstract: We investigate the effects of radiation therapy on the mortality and economic outcomes of breast cancer patients. We implement a 2SLS strategy within a difference-in-difference framework exploiting variation in treatment stemming from a medical guideline change in Denmark. Using administrative data, we reproduce results from an RCT showing the lifesaving benefits of radiotherapy. We then show therapy also has economic returns: ten years after diagnosis, treatment increases employment by 37% and earnings by 45%. Mortality and economic results are driven by results for more educated women, indicating that equalizing access to treatment may not be sufficient to reduce health inequalities.
32167.zh_abstract: 我们研究了放射治疗对乳腺癌患者死亡率和经济结果的影响。我们在一个双重差分框架内实施了两阶段最小二乘策略，利用了丹麦一项医疗指南变更所导致的治疗差异。使用行政数据，我们重现了一项随机对照试验的结果，该试验显示了放射治疗的救命益处。然后，我们证明治疗也具有经济回报：诊断十年后，治疗使就业率提高了37%，收入提高了45%。死亡率和经济结果主要由受教育程度更高的女性的结果驱动，这表明平等获得治疗可能不足以减少健康不平等。

32166.title: On the Effects of Monetary Policy Shocks on Income and Consumption Heterogeneity
32166.zh_title: 论货币政策冲击对收入与消费异质性的影响
32166.abstract: In this paper we use the functional vector autoregression (VAR) framework of Chang, Chen, and Schorfheide (2024) to study the effects of monetary policy shocks (conventional and informational) on the cross-sectional distribution of U.S. earnings (from the Current Population Survey), consumption, and financial income (both from the Consumer Expenditure Survey). We find that a conventional expansionary monetary policy shock reduces earnings inequality, in large part by lifting individuals out of unemployment. There is a weakly positive effect on consumption inequality and no effect on financial income inequality, but credible bands are wide.
32166.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用Chang、Chen和Schorfheide（2024）的函数向量自回归框架，研究货币政策冲击（常规性和信息性）对美国收入（来自当前人口调查）、消费和金融收入（均来自消费者支出调查）的横截面分布的影响。我们发现，常规的扩张性货币政策冲击降低了收入不平等，在很大程度上是通过使个人摆脱失业来实现的。对消费不平等有微弱的正向影响，对金融收入不平等没有影响，但置信区间很宽。

32165.title: Early Childhood Intervention for the Poor: Long Term Outcomes
32165.authors: Pamela Jervis, Lina Cardona-Sosa, Michele Giannola, Sally Grantham-McGregor, Costas Meghir, Marta Rubio-Codina, Monimalika Day, Orazio Attanasio, Alison Andrew, Britta Augsburg
32165.abstract: Early childhood interventions aim to improve parenting, children’s skills, thus reducing poverty. While short-term effects are well documented, evidence on longer-term impacts in low-income countries remains limited. We present results of a medium-term follow-up to a scalable home-visiting randomized intervention in India that previously improved children’s cognitive and language development. After 4.5 years (average child age 7.5 years), significant impacts persisted in early numeracy (0.33 SD, p=0.007) and marginally in literacy (0.27 SD, p=0.064), driven by the most disadvantaged children. IQ differences faded. Parental investment in education and participation in stimulating activities with the child remained increased.
32165.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, PE；JEL：I25, I30, I38, J13, O15

32164.title: Heterogeneity, Uncertainty and Learning: Semiparametric Identification and Estimation
32164.zh_title: 异质性、不确定性与学习：半参数识别与估计
32164.authors: Jackson Bunting, Paul Diegert, Arnaud Maurel
32164.abstract: We provide semiparametric identification results for a broad class of learning models in which continuous outcomes depend on three types of unobservables: i) known heterogeneity, ii) initially unknown heterogeneity that may be revealed over time, and iii) transitory uncertainty. We consider a common environment where the researcher only has access to a short panel on choices and realized outcomes. We establish identification of the outcome equation parameters and the distribution of the three types of unobservables, under the standard assumption that unknown heterogeneity and uncertainty are normally distributed. We also show that, absent known heterogeneity, the model is identified without making any distributional assumption. We then derive the asymptotic properties of a sieve MLE estimator for the model parameters, and devise a tractable profile likelihood based estimation procedure. Monte Carlo simulation results indicate that our estimator exhibits good finite-sample properties.
32164.zh_abstract: 我们为一类广泛的学习模型提供了半参数识别结果，在这些模型中，连续结果取决于三类不可观测因素：i) 已知的异质性，ii) 最初未知但可能随时间揭示的异质性，以及iii) 暂时的不确定性。我们考虑一个常见环境，其中研究者只能获得关于选择和已实现结果的短面板数据。我们在标准假设（即未知异质性和不确定性服从正态分布）下，建立了结果方程参数以及三类不可观测因素分布的识别。我们还表明，在缺乏已知异质性的情况下，该模型无需任何分布假设即可被识别。然后，我们推导了模型参数的筛子最大似然估计量的渐近性质，并设计了一个易于处理的基于轮廓似然的估计程序。蒙特卡洛模拟结果表明，我们的估计量具有良好的有限样本性质。
32164.meta: Programs：ED, EH, IO, LS, TWP；JEL：C14, C50, D83

32163.title: The Cost of Money is Part of the Cost of Living: New Evidence on the Consumer Sentiment Anomaly
32163.zh_title: 货币成本是生活成本的一部分：关于消费者情绪异常的新证据
32163.authors: Marijn A. Bolhuis, Judd N. L. Cramer, Karl Oskar Schulz, Lawrence H. Summers
32163.abstract: Unemployment is low and inflation is falling, but consumer sentiment remains depressed. This has confounded economists, who historically rely on these two variables to gauge how consumers feel about the economy. We propose that borrowing costs, which have grown at rates they had not reached in decades, do much to explain this gap. The cost of money is not currently included in traditional price indexes, indicating a disconnect between the measures favored by economists and the effective costs borne by consumers. We show that the lows in US consumer sentiment that cannot be explained by unemployment and official inflation are strongly correlated with borrowing costs and consumer credit supply. Concerns over borrowing costs, which have historically tracked the cost of money, are at their highest levels since the Volcker-era. We then develop alternative measures of inflation that include borrowing costs and can account for almost three quarters of the gap in US consumer sentiment in 2023. Global evidence shows that consumer sentiment gaps across countries are also strongly correlated with changes in interest rates. Proposed U.S.-specific factors do not find much supportive evidence abroad.
32163.zh_abstract: 失业率很低，通胀正在下降，但消费者情绪仍然低迷。这让经济学家感到困惑，因为他们历来依赖这两个变量来衡量消费者对经济的感受。我们提出，借贷成本（其增长速度是几十年来所未见的）在很大程度上解释了这一差距。货币成本目前并未包含在传统的价格指数中，这表明经济学家偏好的衡量指标与消费者实际承担的有效成本之间存在脱节。我们表明，美国消费者情绪中无法用失业率和官方通胀解释的低点，与借贷成本和消费者信贷供给密切相关。对借贷成本的担忧（历史上与货币成本同步变化）正处于自沃尔克时代以来的最高水平。然后，我们制定了包含借贷成本的替代通胀衡量指标，这些指标可以解释2023年美国消费者情绪近四分之三的差距。全球证据表明，各国消费者情绪差距也与利率变化密切相关。提出的美国特定因素在国外并未找到太多支持性证据。
32163.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, E30, E31, E43, E52, G51, R31

32199.title: Why Survey-Based Subjective Expectations are Meaningful and Important
32199.zh_title: 为何基于调查的主观预期是有意义且重要的
32199.abstract: For decades, households' subjective expectations elicited via surveys have been considered meaningless because they often differ substantially from the forecasts of professionals and ex-post realizations. In sharp contrast, the literature we review shows household characteristics and the ways in which households collect and process economic information help us understand previously-considered puzzling facts about their subjective expectations. In turn, subjective expectations contribute to explain heterogeneous consumption, saving, investment, and debt choices as well as different reactions by similar households to the same monetary and fiscal policy measures. Matching microdata on households' characteristics with the price signals the same households observe, their subjective expectations, and their real-world economic decisions is crucial to establishing these facts. Our growing understanding of households' subjective expectations inspires several theoretical and empirical research directions and begets the design of innovative and more effective policy instruments.
32199.zh_abstract: 几十年来，通过调查得出的家庭主观预期一直被认为毫无意义，因为它们往往与专业预测和事后实现值存在显著差异。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们回顾的文献表明，家庭特征以及家庭收集和处理经济信息的方式，有助于我们理解先前认为关于其主观预期的令人困惑的事实。反过来，主观预期有助于解释异质性的消费、储蓄、投资和债务选择，以及相似家庭对相同货币和财政政策措施的不同反应。将家庭特征的微观数据与这些家庭观察到的价格信号、他们的主观预期以及他们的现实经济决策相匹配，对于确立这些事实至关重要。我们对家庭主观预期的日益深入理解，启发了若干理论和实证研究方向，并催生了创新且更有效的政策工具的设计。
32199.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C90, D14, D84, E31, E52, E71, G11

32198.title: Uncertainty or Frictions? A Quantitative Model of Scarce Safe Assets
32198.zh_title: 不确定性还是摩擦？安全资产稀缺的量化模型
32198.authors: Cosmin L. Ilut, Pavel Krivenko, Martin Schneider
32198.abstract: Why did the real interest rate decline and the equity premium increase over the last 30 years? This paper assesses the role of uncertainty and credit market frictions. We quantify a model with heterogeneous households using data on asset prices and macro aggregates, as well as on households' debt and equity positions. We find that compensation for both uncertainty and frictions is reflected in asset prices. Moreover, a secular increase in frictions is important to understand jointly the decline in real rate and the relative scarcity of debt. Modeling uncertainty as ambiguity allows for tractable characterization of asset premia and precautionary savings effects in steady state.
32198.zh_abstract: 为什么过去30年间实际利率下降而股权溢价上升？本文评估了不确定性和信贷市场摩擦的作用。我们利用资产价格、宏观总量以及家庭债务和股权头寸的数据，量化了一个包含异质性家庭的模型。我们发现，对不确定性和摩擦的补偿都反映在资产价格中。此外，摩擦的长期增加对于共同理解实际利率下降和债务相对稀缺至关重要。将不确定性建模为模糊性，可以便于在稳态下对资产溢价和预防性储蓄效应进行可处理的刻画。

32197.title: Climate Change Economics over Time and Space
32197.zh_title: 跨时空的气候变化经济学
32197.abstract: With average temperature ranging from -20°C at the North Pole to 30°C at the Equator and with global warming expected to reach 1.4°C to 4.5°C by the year 2100, it is clear that climate change will have vastly different effects across the globe. Given the abundance of land in northern latitudes, if population and economic activity could freely move across space, the economic cost of global warming would be greatly reduced. But spatial frictions are real: migrants face barriers, trade and transportation are costly, physical infrastructure is not footloose, and knowledge embedded in clusters of economic activity diffuses only imperfectly. Thus, the economic cost of climate change is intimately connected to these spatial frictions. Building on earlier integrated assessment models that largely ignored space, in the past decade there has been significant progress in developing dynamic spatial integrated assessment models (S-IAMs) aimed at providing a more realistic evaluation of the economic cost of climate change, both locally and globally. This review article discusses this progress and provides a guide for future work in this area.
32197.zh_abstract: 鉴于北极平均气温为-20°C，赤道为30°C，且预计到2100年全球变暖将达到1.4°C至4.5°C，气候变化显然将在全球产生截然不同的影响。考虑到高纬度地区土地充裕，如果人口和经济活动能够自由跨空间移动，全球变暖的经济成本将大幅降低。但空间摩擦是真实存在的：移民面临障碍，贸易和运输成本高昂，物理基础设施并非可随意迁移，嵌入经济活动集群的知识也只能不完全扩散。因此，气候变化的经济成本与这些空间摩擦密切相关。基于早期基本忽略空间的综合评估模型，过去十年在开发动态空间综合评估模型方面取得了显著进展，旨在更现实地评估气候变化在地方和全球层面的经济成本。这篇综述文章讨论了这一进展，并为该领域的未来工作提供了指南。

32196.title: Long Term Care Risk for Couples and Singles
32196.zh_title: 夫妻与单身人士的长期护理风险
32196.authors: Elena Capatina, Gary Hansen, Minchung Hsu
32196.abstract: This paper compares the impact of long term care (LTC) risk on single and married households and studies the roles played by informal care (IC), consumption sharing within households, and Medicaid in insuring this risk. We develop a life-cycle model where individuals face survival and health risk, including the possibility of becoming highly disabled and needing LTC. Households are heterogeneous in various important dimensions including education, productivity, and the age difference between spouses. Health evolves stochastically. Agents make consumption-savings decisions in a framework featuring an LTC state-dependent utility function. We find that household expenditures increase significantly when LTC becomes necessary, but married individuals are well insured against LTC risk due to IC. However, they still hold considerable assets due to the concern for the spouse who might become a widow/widower and can expect much higher LTC costs. IC significantly reduces precautionary savings for middle and high income groups, but interestingly, it encourages asset accumulation among low income groups because it reduces the probability of means-tested Medicaid LTC.
32196.zh_abstract: 本文比较了长期护理风险对单身和已婚家庭的影响，并研究了非正式护理、家庭内消费共享以及医疗补助在保障该风险中的作用。我们构建了一个生命周期模型，其中个体面临生存和健康风险，包括可能变得高度残疾并需要长期护理。家庭在教育、生产力以及配偶年龄差等多个重要维度上存在异质性。健康状况随机演变。代理人在一个具有长期护理状态依赖效用函数的框架中做出消费-储蓄决策。我们发现，当需要长期护理时，家庭支出显著增加，但由于非正式护理的存在，已婚个体能很好地抵御长期护理风险。然而，他们仍然持有大量资产，因为担心配偶可能成为寡妇或鳏夫，并面临更高的长期护理成本。非正式护理显著减少了中高收入群体的预防性储蓄，但有趣的是，它鼓励了低收入群体的资产积累，因为它降低了接受基于经济状况调查的医疗补助长期护理的可能性。

32195.title: Temperature Extremes Impact Mortality and Morbidity Differently
32195.zh_title: 极端温度对死亡率和发病率的影响不同
32195.authors: Carlos F. Gould, Sam Heft-Neal, Alexandra K. Heaney, Eran Bendavid, Christopher W. Callahan, Mathew Kiang, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Marshall Burke
32195.abstract: Increased temperature-related mortality is predicted to be one of the largest contributors to future economic damages from climate change globally, with declines in cold-related deaths in some regions outweighed by increases in heat-related deaths in others. Changes in temperature could also affect non-fatal health outcomes, whose aggregate societal burden is large, yet much less is known about how temperature affects the overall level and distribution of morbidity. Using georeferenced data on emergency department visits, mortality, and daily temperatures across California from 2006-2017, we show that the effect of temperature on mortality differs substantially from its effect on ED visits: mortality increases under extreme heat and cold, whereas ED visits increase under extreme heat but decline under extreme cold. These differential responses fundamentally shape the burden of future climate change: we predict that mortality in California will decrease by 0.32% due to changes in temperatures by mid-century, with declining cold deaths outweighing increasing heat deaths, but that ED visits will increase by 0.46% over the same period in the state, representing a total of 1.9 million excess visits. Our findings suggest that projected impacts of future warming on mortality, including benefits in many areas, might be a poor guide for morbidity impacts.
32195.zh_abstract: 预计与温度相关的死亡率增加将是未来全球气候变化造成经济损失的最大贡献因素之一，某些地区寒冷相关死亡人数的下降被其他地区炎热相关死亡人数的增加所抵消。温度变化也可能影响非致命性健康结果，其总体社会负担巨大，但关于温度如何影响发病率的总体水平和分布，我们知之甚少。利用2006-2017年加利福尼亚州急诊就诊、死亡率和每日气温的地理参考数据，我们表明温度对死亡率的影响与其对急诊就诊的影响存在显著差异：极端高温和极端低温下死亡率均上升，而急诊就诊在极端高温下增加，但在极端低温下减少。这些差异反应从根本上塑造了未来气候变化的负担：我们预测，到本世纪中叶，由于温度变化，加利福尼亚州的死亡率将下降0.32%，寒冷死亡人数的下降超过了炎热死亡人数的增加，但同期该州的急诊就诊量将增加0.46%，相当于总计190万次超额就诊。我们的研究结果表明，未来变暖对死亡率的预计影响（包括许多地区的益处）可能无法很好地指导发病率影响。

32194.title: What Drives Inflation? Lessons from Disaggregated Price Data
32194.zh_title: 什么驱动了通货膨胀？来自分类价格数据的启示
32194.abstract: The Covid pandemic disrupted supply chains and labor markets, with heterogeneous effects on demand and supply across industries. Meanwhile governments responded with unprecedented stimulus packages, and inflation increased to its highest values in 40 years. In this paper I investigate the contribution of aggregate monetary and fiscal policies to inflation, compared to industry-specific disruptions. I argue that, in an economy where multiple industries and primary factors have heterogeneous supply curves, industry-specific shocks to inelastically supplied goods increase aggregate inflation through a cost-push shock. Moreover industry-specific and aggregate shocks have different effects on relative prices, which allows me to identify their respective contribution to aggregate inflation. For US consumer prices, I find that deflation and subsequent inflation in 2020 were due to industry-specific shocks, while since 2021 inflation is primarily driven by aggregate factors.
32194.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情扰乱了供应链和劳动力市场，对各行业的需求和供给产生了异质性影响。与此同时，政府以前所未有的刺激计划作为回应，通货膨胀升至40年来的最高水平。在本文中，我研究了总体货币和财政政策相对于行业特定冲击对通货膨胀的贡献。我认为，在一个多个行业和初级要素具有异质性供给曲线的经济体中，针对供给缺乏弹性的商品的行业特定冲击会通过成本推动冲击提高总体通货膨胀。此外，行业特定冲击和总体冲击对相对价格有不同的影响，这使我能够识别它们各自对总体通货膨胀的贡献。对于美国消费者价格，我发现2020年的通缩及随后的通胀是由行业特定冲击造成的，而自2021年以来，通货膨胀主要由总体因素驱动。

32193.title: Appropriate Entrepreneurship? The Rise of China and the Developing World
32193.zh_title: 适宜的创业精神？中国的崛起与发展中世界
32193.authors: Josh Lerner, Junxi Liu, Jacob Moscona, David Y. Yang
32193.abstract: Global innovation and entrepreneurship have traditionally been dominated by a handful of high-income countries, especially the US. This paper investigates the international consequences of the rise of a new hub for innovation, focusing on the dramatic ascent of high-potential entrepreneurship and venture capital in China. First, using comprehensive global data, we show that as the Chinese venture industry rose in importance in certain sectors, entrepreneurship increased substantially in other emerging markets. Using a broad set of country-level economic indicators, we find that this effect was driven by country-sector pairs most similar to their counterparts in China. The estimates are similar when exploiting Chinese sector-specific policies that affected the likelihood of entrepreneurship. Second, turning to mechanisms, we show that the baseline findings are driven by local investors and by new firms that more closely resemble existing Chinese companies. Third, we find that this growth in emerging market investment had wide-ranging economic consequences, including a rise in serial entrepreneurship, cross-sector spillovers, innovation, and broader measures of socioeconomic well-being. Together, our findings suggest that many developing countries benefited from the more “appropriate” businesses and technology that resulted from a rise of an innovation hub in an emerging economy.
32193.zh_abstract: 全球创新和创业精神传统上由少数高收入国家主导，尤其是美国。本文研究了新兴创新中心的崛起对国际的影响，重点关注中国高潜力创业精神和风险投资的急剧增长。首先，利用全面的全球数据，我们表明，随着中国风险投资行业在某些领域的重要性上升，其他新兴市场的创业精神显著增加。利用一套广泛的国家级经济指标，我们发现这种效应是由那些与其中国同行最相似的国家-行业对驱动的。当利用影响创业可能性的中国特定行业政策时，估计结果相似。其次，转向机制，我们表明基线发现是由本地投资者和更类似于现有中国公司的新企业驱动的。第三，我们发现，新兴市场投资的这种增长产生了广泛的经济后果，包括连续创业的兴起、跨行业溢出效应、创新以及更广泛的社会经济福祉指标。总之，我们的研究结果表明，许多发展中国家受益于新兴经济体创新中心崛起所带来的更“适宜”的企业和技术。

32192.title: Innovation: The Bright Side of Common Ownership?
32192.zh_title: 创新：共同所有权的光明面？
32192.authors: Miguel Antón, Florian Ederer, Mireia Giné, Martin C. Schmalz
32192.abstract: Firms have inefficiently low incentives to innovate when other firms benefit from their inventions and the innovating firm therefore does not capture the full surplus of its innovations. We show that common ownership of firms mitigates this impediment to corporate innovation. By contrast, without technological spillovers, innovation has the effect of stealing market share from rivals; in that case, more common ownership reduces innovation. Empirically, the association between common ownership and innovation inputs and outputs decreases with product market proximity and increases with technology proximity. The sign and magnitude of the overall relationship between common ownership and corporate innovation thus varies considerably across the universe of firms depending on their relative proximity in technology and product market space. These results persist if we use only variation from BlackRock's acquisition of BGI. Our results inform the debate about the welfare effects of increasing common ownership among U.S. corporations.
32192.zh_abstract: 当其他公司从其发明中受益，而创新公司因此无法获得其创新的全部剩余时，公司的创新激励就会低效地偏低。我们表明，公司的共同所有权缓解了这种对公司创新的阻碍。相比之下，在没有技术溢出的情况下，创新具有从竞争对手那里夺取市场份额的效果；在这种情况下，更多的共同所有权会减少创新。实证上，共同所有权与创新投入和产出之间的关联随着产品市场邻近度的增加而减弱，随着技术邻近度的增加而增强。因此，共同所有权与公司创新之间总体关系的符号和大小，根据公司在技术和产品市场空间中的相对邻近度，在整个公司范围内存在显著差异。如果我们仅使用贝莱德收购巴克莱全球投资者公司带来的变化，这些结果依然存在。我们的研究结果为关于美国公司中日益增长的共同所有权福利效应的辩论提供了信息。
32192.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：G30, L20, L40, O31

32191.title: The How and Why of Household Reactions to Income Shocks
32191.zh_title: 家庭对收入冲击反应的“如何”与“为何”
32191.authors: Roberto Colarieti, Pierfrancesco Mei, Stefanie Stantcheva
32191.abstract: This paper studies how and why households adjust their spending, saving, and borrowing in response to transitory income shocks. We leverage new large-scale survey data to first quantitatively assess households’ intertemporal marginal propensities to consume (MPCs) and deleverage (MPDs) (the “how”), and second to dive into the motivations and decision-making processes across households (the “why”). The combination of the quantitative estimation of household response dynamics with a qualitative exploration of the mental models employed during financial decisions provides a more complete view of household behavior. Our findings are as follows. First, we validate the reliability of surveys in predicting actual economic behaviors using a new approach called cross-validation, which compares the responses to hypothetical financial scenarios with observed actions from past studies. Participants’ predicted reactions closely align with real-life behaviors. Second, we show that MPCs are significantly higher immediately following an income shock and diminish over time, with cumulative MPCs over a year showing significant variability. However, MPDs play a critical role in household financial adjustments and display significantly more cross-sectional heterogeneity. Neither is easily explained by socioeconomic or financial characteristics alone, and the explanatory power is improved by adding psychological factors, past experiences, and expectations. Third, using specifically-designed survey questions, we find that there is a broad range of motivations behind households’ financial decisions and identify four household types using machine learning: Strongly Constrained, Precautionary, Quasi-Smoothers, and Spenders. Similar financial actions stem from diverse reasons, challenging the predictability of financial behavior solely based on socioeconomic and financial characteristics. Finally, we use our findings to address some puzzles in household finance.
32191.zh_abstract: 本文研究家庭如何以及为何调整其支出、储蓄和借贷以应对暂时性收入冲击。我们利用新的大规模调查数据，首先定量评估家庭的跨期边际消费倾向和去杠杆倾向（“如何”），其次深入探讨不同家庭的动机和决策过程（“为何”）。将家庭反应动态的定量估计与对财务决策中所用心理模型的定性探索相结合，提供了对家庭行为更完整的视角。我们的发现如下。首先，我们使用一种称为交叉验证的新方法验证了调查在预测实际经济行为方面的可靠性，该方法将受访者对假设财务情景的反应与过去研究中的观察到的行为进行比较。参与者预测的反应与真实行为高度一致。其次，我们表明，边际消费倾向在收入冲击后立即显著升高，并随时间推移而减弱，一年内的累积边际消费倾向显示出显著的可变性。然而，去杠杆倾向在家庭财务调整中起着关键作用，并显示出显著更大的横截面异质性。两者都难以仅用社会经济或财务特征来解释，而加入心理因素、过往经历和预期后，解释力有所提高。第三，利用专门设计的调查问题，我们发现家庭财务决策背后存在广泛的动机，并通过机器学习识别出四种家庭类型：强约束型、预防型、准平滑型和挥霍型。相似的财务行为源于不同的原因，这对仅基于社会经济和财务特征来预测财务行为提出了挑战。最后，我们利用我们的发现来解决家庭金融中的一些谜题。
32191.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：D12, D15, E06, E21, H31

32190.title: Capital and Wages
32190.abstract: Does capital accumulation increase labor demand and wages? Neoclassical production functions, where capital and labor are q-complements, ensure that the answer is yes, so long as labor markets are competitive. This result critically depends on the assumption that capital accumulation does not change the technologies being developed and used. I adapt the theory of endogenous technological change to investigate this question when technology also responds to capital accumulation. I show that there are strong parallels between the relationship between capital and wages and existing results on the conditions under which equilibrium factor demands are upward-sloping (e.g., Acemoglu, 2007). Extending this framework, I provide intuitive conditions and simple examples where a greater capital stock leads to lower wages, because it triggers more automation. I then offer an endogenous growth model with a menu of technologies where equilibrium involves choices over both the extent of automation and the rate of growth of labor-augmenting productivity. In this framework, capital accumulation and technological change in the long run are associated with wage growth, but an increase in the saving rate increases the extent of automation, and at first reduces the wage rate and subsequently depresses its long-run growth rate.
32190.zh_abstract: 资本积累是否会增加劳动力需求和工资？新古典生产函数假设资本与劳动力是q-互补品，确保在劳动力市场竞争的前提下答案是肯定的。这一结论关键依赖于资本积累不会改变正在开发和使用技术的假设。本文调整内生技术变革理论，研究当技术也对资本积累做出反应时这一问题。我证明，资本与工资之间的关系，与关于均衡要素需求向上倾斜条件的现有结果（例如Acemoglu, 2007）存在强烈相似性。扩展这一框架后，我提供了直观条件和简单例子，表明更大的资本存量会因引发更多自动化而导致工资下降。接着，我提出一个包含技术菜单的内生增长模型，其中均衡涉及对自动化程度和劳动增强型生产率增长率的共同选择。在该框架中，长期内的资本积累和技术变革与工资增长相关，但储蓄率的提高会提升自动化程度，起初降低工资率，随后抑制其长期增长率。

32189.title: The Mortality Effects of Healthcare Consolidation: Evidence from Emergency Department Closures
32189.zh_title: 医疗整合的死亡率效应：来自急诊科关闭的证据
32189.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Xue Wu
32189.abstract: We examine whether loss of emergency department services is associated with county-level mortality rates in rural areas over the period 2005-2018. We use a propensity-weighted difference-in-difference approach, comparing counties that lost emergency department services to counties that retained them during our period. In the full sample, we find no effects of emergency department closure on all-cause mortality; drug, alcohol, and suicide deaths; or AMI mortality. We find that closure is associated with increased drug-related deaths among white and younger-aged females, and in the Midwest and the West, as well as an increase in AMI mortality in the South and West.
32189.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2005-2018年期间农村地区急诊服务丧失是否与县级死亡率相关。采用倾向性加权双重差分方法，比较了研究期间失去急诊服务的县与保留急诊服务的县。在全样本中，我们发现急诊科关闭对全因死亡率、药物/酒精/自杀死亡或急性心肌梗死死亡率没有影响。但发现关闭与白人和年轻女性中药物相关死亡增加相关，在中西部和西部地区也是如此，同时在南部和西部地区急性心肌梗死死亡率上升。

32188.title: International Trade and Macroeconomic Dynamics with Sanctions
32188.zh_title: 制裁下的国际贸易与宏观经济动态
32188.authors: Fabio Ghironi, Daisoon Kim, G. Kemal Ozhan
32188.abstract: We develop a framework combining dynamic, intertemporal choices of general-equilibrium macro models with microfoundations of modern trade theory to study sanctions. In a two-country, two-sector setup, Home holds a comparative advantage in producing differentiated consumption goods via heterogeneous firms with endogenous entry, while Foreign in homogeneous intermediate goods from a fixed number of firms. Sanctions include trade bans and financial restrictions excluding particular Foreign agents from markets. In our model, sanctions reallocate resources across and within countries, affecting production, exchange rates, and welfare, with larger welfare losses when targeting sectors of comparative disadvantage. Focusing only on long-run outcomes, overlooking initial dynamics, inaccurately assesses welfare impacts. Sanctions weaken international comovement and fragment markets but leave business cycles intact.
32188.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架，结合一般均衡宏观模型的动态跨期选择与现代贸易理论的微观基础来研究制裁。在两国、两部门设定中，本国通过异质性企业内生进入在差异化消费品生产上具有比较优势，而外国通过固定数量企业在同质中间品上具有比较优势。制裁包括贸易禁令和将特定外国代理人排除在外的金融限制。在我们的模型中，制裁在国家内部和国家之间重新配置资源，影响生产、汇率和福利，当针对比较劣势部门时福利损失更大。仅关注长期结果而忽视初始动态，会不准确地评估福利影响。制裁削弱了国际联动并分割市场，但商业周期保持完整。
32188.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F31, F41, F42, F51

32187.title: The Role of Advertisers and Platforms in Monetizing Misinformation: Descriptive and Experimental Evidence
32187.zh_title: 广告商与平台在虚假信息货币化中的作用：描述性与实验证据
32187.authors: Wajeeha Ahmad, Ananya Sen, Chuck Eesley, Erik Brynjolfsson
32187.abstract: The financial motivation to earn advertising revenue by spreading misinformation has been widely conjectured to be among the main reasons misinformation continues to be prevalent online. Research aimed at reducing the spread of misinformation has so far focused on user-level interventions with little emphasis on how the supply of misinformation can itself be countered. In this work, we show how online misinformation is largely financially sustained via advertising, examine how financing misinformation affects the advertisers and ad platforms involved and outline ways of reducing the financing of misinformation. First, we find that advertising on misinformation outlets is pervasive for companies across several industries and is amplified by digital ad platforms that automatically distribute companies’ ads across the web. Using an information provision survey experiment, we show that people decrease their demand for a company’s products or services upon learning about its role in monetizing misinformation via online ads. To shed light on why misinformation continues to be monetized despite the potential backlash for the advertisers involved, we survey decision-makers at companies. We find that most decision-makers are unaware of their companies’ ads appearing on misinformation websites but have a strong preference to avoid appearing on such websites. Moreover, those uncertain and unaware about their role in financing misinformation increase their demand for a platform-based solution to reduce monetizing misinformation upon learning about how platforms amplify ad placement on misinformation websites. We identify low-cost, scalable information-based interventions that digital platforms could implement to reduce the financial incentive to misinform and counter the supply of misinformation online.
32187.zh_abstract: 通过传播虚假信息赚取广告收入的财务动机被广泛认为是虚假信息持续在线流行的主要原因之一。旨在减少虚假信息传播的研究迄今集中于用户层面的干预，很少强调如何从源头遏制虚假信息的供给。在这项工作中，我们展示了在线虚假信息如何主要通过广告获得财务支持，考察了资助虚假信息如何影响相关广告商和广告平台，并概述了减少虚假信息融资的途径。首先，我们发现多个行业的公司普遍在虚假信息媒体上投放广告，且这一现象被自动将公司广告分发到网络各处的数字广告平台放大。通过信息提供调查实验，我们表明，当人们了解到某公司通过在线广告在虚假信息货币化中扮演角色时，会降低对该公司产品或服务的需求。为了揭示尽管广告商可能面临反弹但虚假信息仍被货币化的原因，我们调查了公司决策者。我们发现大多数决策者不知道其公司广告出现在虚假信息网站上，但有强烈意愿避免出现在此类网站上。此外，那些对自己在资助虚假信息中的角色不确定或不知情的人，在了解到平台如何放大虚假信息网站上的广告投放后，会增加对基于平台的解决方案的需求以减少虚假信息货币化。我们识别出数字平台可以实施的低成本、可扩展的信息干预措施，以减少虚假信息的财务激励并遏制在线虚假信息的供给。

32186.title: Friends with Benefits: Social Capital and Household Financial Behavior
32186.zh_title: 互惠之友：社会资本与家庭金融行为
32186.authors: Brad Cannon, David Hirshleifer, Joshua Thornton
32186.abstract: Using friendship data from Facebook, we find that among three aspects of social capital, Economic Connectedness — the fraction of one’s social network with high income — has the strongest relationship with stock market and saving participation. One standard-deviation greater Economic Connectedness is associated with 10.6 percentage points greater stock market participation and 9.2 percentage points greater saving participation. Evidence from income shocks to non-local friends suggests that the relationship is causal. Decomposing this result, we find that the association of Economic Connectedness with participation derives from exposure to wealthy individuals rather than from class-based friending propensities.
32186.zh_abstract: 利用Facebook的友谊数据，我们发现社会资本的三个维度中，经济连通性——个人社交网络中高收入者的比例——与股市参与和储蓄参与的关系最强。经济连通性每增加一个标准差，股市参与率提高10.6个百分点，储蓄参与率提高9.2个百分点。来自非本地朋友收入冲击的证据表明这种关系是因果性的。分解这一结果，我们发现经济连通性与参与度的关联源于接触富裕个体，而非基于阶层的交友倾向。
32186.meta: Programs：AP, DEV；JEL：D14, D15, D63, G4, G40, G41, G5, G50, G51, I3, I30, I31, I38, O16

32185.title: Optimal Urban Transportation Policy: Evidence from Chicago
32185.zh_title: 最优城市交通政策：来自芝加哥的证据
32185.authors: Milena Almagro, Felipe Barbieri, Juan Camilo Castillo, Nathaniel G. Hickok, Tobias Salz
32185.abstract: We characterize and quantify optimal urban transportation policies in the presence of congestion and environmental externalities. A municipal government sets public transit policies—fares and frequencies—and road prices to maximize welfare. The government faces a budget constraint that introduces monopoly-like distortions and the potential need to cross-subsidize modes. We apply this framework to Chicago, for which we construct a new dataset that comprehensively captures transportation choices. We find that road pricing alone leads to large welfare gains by reducing externalities, but at the expense of travelers, whose surplus falls even if road pricing revenues are fully rebated. The optimal public transit price is near zero, with increased bus and train frequencies. Combining transit policies with road pricing slackens the budget constraint, allowing for even higher transit frequencies and lower prices, thereby increasing consumer surplus after rebates.
32185.zh_abstract: 我们在存在拥堵和环境外部性的情况下，刻画并量化了最优城市交通政策。市政政府设定公共交通政策——票价和频率——以及道路价格以最大化社会福利。政府面临预算约束，这引入了类似垄断的扭曲以及跨模式交叉补贴的潜在需求。我们将该框架应用于芝加哥，为此构建了一个全面捕捉交通选择的新数据集。我们发现，仅道路定价通过减少外部性带来巨大福利收益，但代价是旅行者剩余下降，即使道路定价收入完全返还。最优公共交通票价接近零，同时增加公交和火车频率。将交通政策与道路定价相结合放松了预算约束，从而允许更高的交通频率和更低的价格，进而提高了返还后的消费者剩余。

32184.title: Finance in a Time of Disruptive Growth
32184.zh_title: 颠覆性增长时代的金融
32184.abstract: We propose a unified theory of asset price determination encompassing both “conventional” and “alternative” asset classes (private equity, real estate, etc.). The model features disruption of old by young firms and skewness in the distribution of innovative rents among the young innovators. The relative size of asset classes, the dynamics of rich investors’ wealth, and the returns of the various asset classes are jointly determined in equilibrium. Besides explaining the observed patterns of returns across asset classes, we analyze the theoretical properties of the most widely used performance-evaluation measure for alternative investments. We also provide connections between the growth of alternative investments, the dispersion of returns across investors, and the turnover inside the ranks of wealthy individuals.
32184.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个统一的资产价格决定理论，涵盖“传统”和“另类”资产类别（私募股权、房地产等）。该模型刻画了年轻企业对老企业的颠覆以及创新租金在年轻创新者之间的偏态分布。资产类别的相对规模、富裕投资者财富的动态以及各类资产的回报在均衡中共同决定。除了解释观察到的跨资产类别回报模式，我们还分析了最广泛使用的另类投资绩效评估指标的理论性质。我们还提供了另类投资增长、投资者间回报差异以及富裕个体阶层内部更替之间的联系。
32184.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：G11, G12, G24, O49

32183.title: Venture Debt
32183.abstract: The provision of venture debt financing to growth-oriented startups which are backed by venture capital (VC) equity has been a bit of a puzzle given the lack of positive cash flows or traditional collateral of such startups. This short paper lays out the hurdles for debt to overcome to be a viable source of finance and casts the three types of venture debt – patent loans, venture leverage, and bridge loans – as solutions to such hurdles, casting the literature in terms of financial innovation. Finally, the paper addresses the risks implied by venture debt and discusses whether the demise of Silicon Valley Bank speaks to whether innovation ecosystem risk transmutes to the financial system through debt and the extent to which innovation ecosystem risk remains unstudied.
32183.zh_abstract: 向由风险资本股权支持的成长型初创企业提供风险债务融资一直是一个谜题，因为此类初创企业缺乏正现金流或传统抵押品。这篇短文阐述了债务成为可行融资来源需要克服的障碍，并将三种类型的风险债务——专利贷款、风险杠杆和过桥贷款——视为这些障碍的解决方案，从金融创新的角度梳理了相关文献。最后，本文讨论了风险债务所隐含的风险，并探讨了硅谷银行的倒闭是否表明创新生态系统风险通过债务传导至金融体系，以及创新生态系统风险在多大程度上仍未被研究。

32182.title: The Distributional Effects of Asset Returns
32182.abstract: We study the distributional effects of asset returns using a heterogeneous-agent model estimated to match the joint distribution of wealth and returns. In the model, endogenous portfolio decisions play a key role through their impact on households' wealth accumulation. We find substantial welfare effects of changes in asset returns. A permanent decline of one percentage point in expected returns increases the consumption share of the top 10% by 6% permanently. Our findings suggest that lower returns increase inequality, which contradicts Piketty's (2014) r-g formula. To resolve this contradiction, we derive a generalized formula that includes the consumption/wealth ratio and which is consistent with our empirical and theoretical findings. Nonetheless, wealth inequality within the Pareto tail is fairly insensitive to asset returns. Instead, inequality between the Pareto tail and the lower range of the distribution responds strongly to asset returns through their differential effects on active savings relative to wealth. Simulations suggest that asset price dynamics can explain the main variations in U.S. top wealth shares since the 1960s.
32182.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个估计了财富与回报联合分布的异质性主体模型，研究资产回报的分配效应。在该模型中，内生投资组合决策通过其对家庭财富积累的影响发挥着关键作用。我们发现资产回报变化会产生显著的福利效应。预期回报率永久性下降一个百分点，会使前10%人群的消费份额永久性增加6%。我们的研究结果表明，较低的回报率会加剧不平等，这与皮凯蒂（2014）的r-g公式相矛盾。为解决这一矛盾，我们推导出一个包含消费/财富比率的广义公式，该公式与我们的实证和理论发现一致。尽管如此，帕累托尾部的财富不平等对资产回报并不十分敏感。相反，帕累托尾部与分布较低区间之间的不平等，会通过资产回报对相对于财富的主动储蓄产生的差异化效应，而对资产回报做出强烈反应。模拟结果表明，资产价格动态可以解释自20世纪60年代以来美国顶层财富份额的主要变化。

32181.title: Genetic Risk for Alzheimer’s Disease and Related Dementias: Cognition, Economic Behavior, and Actionable Information
32181.zh_title: 阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症的遗传风险：认知、经济行为与可操作信息
32181.authors: Yeongmi Jeong, Nicholas W. Papageorge, Meghan Skira, Kevin Thom
32181.abstract: Genetic factors play a major role in the development of Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias (ADRD). With increased access to genetic data, observable genetic factors could impact household planning and medical care if they contain actionable information, meaning that they i) are associated with significant harms, ii) reflect risks for which individuals are not already prepared, and iii) are informative above and beyond current knowledge or expectations. We examine these properties for existing genetic measures related to ADRD in the Health and Retirement Study (HRS). We replicate existing relationships between genetic factors and cognitive health. We also show that higher genetic risk is associated with worse economic outcomes on several dimensions including work, income, and wealth. Surprisingly, individuals at higher risk are less likely to engage in planning activities that could mitigate the consequences of cognitive decline (e.g., holding long-term care insurance or assigning durable power of attorney). In predictive exercises, existing genetic indices provide clinically valuable and policy-relevant information on the development of severe adverse cognitive outcomes in the future. Our findings suggest there is a large population of individuals at genetic risk for ADRD who are not protected from cognitive decline despite genetic risk, not insulated from its economic consequences, and relatively unprepared to deal with possible burdens of future ADRD.
32181.zh_abstract: 遗传因素在阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症（ADRD）的发展中起着重要作用。随着遗传数据获取的增加，如果可观察的遗传因素包含可操作信息，即它们（i）与重大危害相关，（ii）反映了个人尚未做好准备的风险，并且（iii）在现有知识或预期之外提供了额外信息，那么这些因素可能会影响家庭规划和医疗保健。我们在健康与退休研究（HRS）中检验了与ADRD相关的现有遗传指标的这些特性。我们复制了遗传因素与认知健康之间的现有关系。我们还表明，较高的遗传风险与多个维度上更差的经济结果相关，包括工作、收入和财富。令人惊讶的是，高风险个体更不倾向于参与那些可能减轻认知衰退后果的规划活动（例如，持有长期护理保险或指定持久授权委托书）。在预测练习中，现有的遗传指数为未来严重不良认知结果的发展提供了具有临床价值和政策相关性的信息。我们的研究结果表明，存在大量具有ADRD遗传风险的个体，他们尽管有遗传风险，却未受到针对认知衰退的保护，也未免受其经济后果的影响，并且相对而言未准备好应对未来ADRD可能带来的负担。
32181.meta: Programs：AG；JEL：D14, G51, G52, I12, I14, J14, J22, J26

32180.title: Tax Policy and Investment in a Global Economy
32180.zh_title: 全球经济中的税收政策与投资
32180.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Matthew Smith, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
32180.abstract: We evaluate the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. Combining reduced-form estimates from tax data with a global investment model, we estimate responses, identify parameters, and conduct counterfactuals. Domestic investment of firms with the mean tax change increases 20% versus a no-change baseline. Due to novel foreign incentives, foreign capital of U.S. multinationals rises substantially. These incentives also boost domestic investment, indicating complementarity between domestic and foreign capital. In the model, the long-run effect on domestic capital in general equilibrium is 7% and the tax revenue feedback from growth offsets only 2p.p. of the direct cost of 41% of pre-TCJA corporate revenue.
32180.zh_abstract: 我们评估了2017年《减税与就业法案》。通过将来自税收数据的简化形式估计与一个全球投资模型相结合，我们估计了反应、识别了参数，并进行了反事实分析。与无变化基准相比，面临平均税收变化的公司的国内投资增长了20%。由于新颖的海外激励措施，美国跨国公司的外国资本大幅增加。这些激励措施也促进了国内投资，表明国内资本与外国资本之间存在互补性。在该模型中，一般均衡下对国内资本的长期影响为7%，而增长带来的税收收入反馈仅抵消了占《减税与就业法案》前企业收入41%的直接成本的2个百分点。
32180.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, PE；JEL：E22, F21, F23, H0, H25

32179.title: Do For-Profit Hospitals Cream-Skim Patients? Evidence from Inpatient Psychiatric Care in California
32179.zh_title: 营利性医院会挑选患者吗？来自加利福尼亚州住院精神科护理的证据
32179.authors: Donghoon Lee, Anirban Basu, Jerome A. Dugan, Pinar Karaca-Mandic
32179.abstract: The paper examines whether, among inpatient psychiatric admissions in California, for-profit (FP) hospitals engage in cream skimming, i.e., choosing patients for some characteristic(s) other than their need for care, which enhances the profitability of the provider. We propose a novel approach to identify cream skimming using cost outcomes. Naïve treatment effect estimates of hospital ownership type consist of the impact of differential patient case mix (selection) and hospital cost containment strategies (execution). In contrast, an instrumental variable (IV) approach can control for case mix and establish the causal effects of ownership type due to its execution. We interpret the difference in naïve and IV treatment effects to be driven by FP hospitals’ selection (cream skimming) based on unobserved patient case mix. We find that FP hospitals are more likely to treat high-cost patients than not-for-profit (NFP) hospitals, showing no evidence that FP hospitals engage in cream skimming. Our results may alleviate concerns surrounding the recent proliferation of FP psychiatric hospitals with regards to cream skimming.
32179.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在加利福尼亚州的住院精神科入院患者中，营利性（FP）医院是否进行“挑奶皮”（cream skimming），即根据除护理需求以外的某些特征选择患者，以提高提供者的盈利能力。我们提出了一种利用成本结果来识别挑奶皮行为的新方法。医院所有权类型的朴素处理效应估计包括患者病例组合差异（选择）和医院成本控制策略（执行）的影响。相比之下，工具变量（IV）方法可以控制病例组合，并建立所有权类型因其执行而产生的因果效应。我们将朴素处理效应与IV处理效应之间的差异解释为FP医院基于未观测到的患者病例组合进行的选择（挑奶皮）。我们发现，与非营利性（NFP）医院相比，FP医院更可能治疗高成本患者，没有证据表明FP医院存在挑奶皮行为。我们的结果可能缓解近期FP精神科医院激增所带来的关于挑奶皮的担忧。

32178.title: The IPCC Shared Socioeconomic Pathways (SSPs): Explained, Evaluated, Replaced
32178.zh_title: IPCC共享社会经济路径（SSPs）：解释、评估与替代
32178.abstract: Shared socioeconomic pathways (SSPs) are perhaps the most influential economic policy analyses today. My paper evaluates their development, natural associations, logical consequences, and economic identification. All five SSP baseline scenarios are predicting scenarios that historical time-series analysis would consider empirically highly implausible. This alternative — econometric time-series analysis based on worldwide IPAT components — suggests alternative emission scenarios, mapping into expected radiative forcing of about RCP 6.5, with a reasonable plausibility range from RCP 4.5 to RCP 7.0.
32178.zh_abstract: 共享社会经济路径（SSPs）或许是当今最具影响力的经济政策分析工具。我的论文评估了它们的发展、自然关联、逻辑后果以及经济识别。所有五个SSP基线情景所预测的情景，历史时间序列分析会认为其在经验上极不可能。这种替代方案——基于全球IPAT组成部分的计量经济学时间序列分析——提出了替代排放情景，映射到约RCP 6.5的预期辐射强迫，合理的可能性范围从RCP 4.5到RCP 7.0。
